name: Sour Cream Onion-Chive Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all coating ingredients except butter in a bowl.
3. Dip chicken pieces in the melted butter, then coat with the crumb mixture. Reserve any remaining crumbs and butter.
4. Place chicken and onions in a 13x9 inch baking pan. Sprinkle reserved crumbs over the onions and drizzle with remaining butter.
5. Bake, basting occasionally, for 60 to 70 minutes or until fork tender. Remove chicken to a platter and keep warm.
6. To make sauce, scrape the baking pan and pour the pan drippings into a 2-quart sautépan.
7. Stir in flour. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until bubbly, about 1 minute.
8. Reduce heat to medium. Stir in sour cream and pepper. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until heated through. If needed, add milk until the desired consistency is reached.
9. Serve sauce over chicken and onions. Sprinkle with chives.
